name: multi-lens-research
description: Turns Claude into a rigorous multi-lens researcher. Instead of firing several identical 'research this' searches that converge on the same first-page consensus, it assigns distinct research lenses (academic, technical, applied, news, and a dedicated contrarian lens), gathers claims with sources and confidence, adversarially verifies the load-bearing ones, runs anti-confirmation-bias follow-up rounds that weight the disconfirming side, and synthesizes a cited report that separates verified from contested from unknown. Runs as a parallel subagent fan-out when the harness supports it, or a single-agent sequential loop when it doesn't. Composes with deep-research and web-search skills.
